note: seq=137: install the CONTINUOUS email-scaler as a BOUNDED BACKGROUND timer (atlas-deepcrawl.timer, every 3min after finish, batch 30, TimeoutStartSec=300, MemoryMax=900M, Nice=10) running the v3 worker. Heavy work runs OUT of the deploy step so it can never block the pipe (per the no-heavy-deploy-step rule). Units written to /opt/atlas (allowed path) then linked+enabled via systemctl. Drives email coverage up continuously; bounded so it can't blow memory or wedge.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS deep-crawl email scaler (bounded background)
After=postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Environment=DEEPCRAWL_BATCH=30
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_email_deepcrawl.py
TimeoutStartSec=300
MemoryMax=900M
Nice=10

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS deep-crawl email scaler cadence

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitInactiveSec=3min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
